# claude_user (Resource)

Manages a Claude organization user. Users cannot be created via the API; use `terraform import` to manage existing users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Users cannot be created via the API.
# Import an existing user, then manage their role.
resource "claude_user" "example" {
  role = "organization_admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role` (String) The role of the user in the organization.

### Read-Only

- `added_at` (String) The timestamp when the user was added to the organization.
- `email` (String) The email address of the user.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user.
- `name` (String) The name of the user.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import claude_user.example user_01EXAMPLE
```
